hero.title: Welcome to Devcon
hero.subtitle: An intensive introduction for new Ethereum explorers, a global family reunion for those already part of our ecosystem.aaa

about.body:
Devcon is the Ethereum conference for **developers**, researchers, thinkers, and makers.

We host Devcon to educate and empower the community to build and use decentralized systems.

Our goal is to push the boundaries of possibility in our mission to bring decentralized protocols, tools, and culture to the world.
about.heading:
## What is Devcon?
# the best thing ever

features.heading: ## Key Features
features.item3: A global gathering spanning multiple continents
